thresholds.rationale:
Thresholds chosen for MONAI docs + issue retrieval use case.
Faithfulness: Medical docs are precise; 0.80 ensures grounding.
Answer relevancy: MONAI questions are technical; 0.75 = high semantic match.
Hit@5: With multi-query + hybrid retrieval, 70% Hit@5 on golden set is realistic.
Ablation results (2026-05-21): all 4 configs achieved 80% Hit@5 on 10-probe set,
confirming the 70% threshold is achievable and the corpus has sufficient signal.
